summary: EXP-452 P4-P8 address the 6-hole batch: P4 rewrites WIN-058 finding to lead with V12/V13 reconciliation (verdict Misleading retained); P5 broadens Not Demonstrated definition to absorb registered-prospective-pending claims (WIN-058b); P6 adds b-suffix convention note to Part 3.1 preamble; P7 augments Std Model Explains legend with Non-discriminating sub-pattern sentence; P8 reorders verdict legend by evidential force and wraps the Verdict Categories block in the site-standard progressive-disclosure pattern. P8 already merges P5+P7 wording — decider can land P8 standalone if preferred.
